title: Bosnia and Herzegovina — National Identity Card Issuance/Replacement Application (Obrazac LK/OI-1)
description: Obrazac LK/OI-1, "Zahtjev za izdavanje - zamjenu lične karte/osobne iskaznice" (Request for Issuance/Replacement of the National Identity Card), the harmonized application form for a Bosnia and Herzegovina citizen's biometric national identity card (lična karta/osobna iskaznica). The form's own legal basis is the state-level Zakon o ličnoj karti državljana Bosne i Hercegovine (Law on the Identity Card of Citizens of Bosnia and Herzegovina) and its implementing Pravilnik o obrascu zahtjeva za izdavanje i zamjenu lične karte, postupku izdavanja i zamjene lične karte i načinu vođenja evidencija o zahtjevima ("Službeni glasnik BiH", 39/02, as amended 2/09, 102/12, 41/14), both published at the state level and administered by IDDEEA (Agencija za identifikacione dokumente, evidenciju i razmjenu podataka Bosne i Hercegovine — the Agency for Identification Documents, Registers and Data Exchange of Bosnia and Herzegovina), which itself hosts a copy of the underlying Pravilnik. The identical LK/OI-1 form is used nationwide regardless of which entity, canton, or the Brčko District a citizen submits it in; this schema is therefore scoped at the country level, unlike this registry's existing entity-scoped Bosnia and Herzegovina schemas (Republika Srpska only). Opens Bosnia and Herzegovina's National ID & Civic Documents vertical. This v1.0.0 models the applicant-facing fields only; the form's own signature lines and the header's office-assigned reference number/date, filed by the receiving authority upon intake, are out of scope (see VERIFICATION.md). GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Bosnia and Herzegovina or IDDEEA.

authority.name: Агенција за идентификационе документе, евиденцију и размјену података Босне и Херцеговине (Agencija za identifikacione dokumente, evidenciju i razmjenu podataka Bosne i Hercegovine, Agency for Identification Documents, Registers and Data Exchange of Bosnia and Herzegovina)

source.documentRef: Obrazac LK/OI-1 — "Zahtjev za izdavanje - zamjenu lične karte/osobne iskaznice" (Request for Issuance/Replacement of the National Identity Card), prescribed by the Pravilnik o obrascu zahtjeva za izdavanje i zamjenu lične karte ("Službeni glasnik BiH", 39/02, as amended)

verification.notes: GOV-4734 ("GovSchema Standard Research"). Opens Bosnia and Herzegovina's National ID & Civic Documents vertical, scoped at country level (state-prescribed form, not entity-scoped). See this document's own VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record, extraction method, and every disclosed scoping/judgment call.

fields.name: receivingAuthorityName
fields.label: Naziv organa/tijela (Name of the authority/body)
fields.description: The competent authority (e.g. the local police administration/CIPS counter) the applicant is submitting this request to.

fields.name: requestType
fields.label: Vrsta zahtjeva (Type of request)
fields.description: Whether this is a first-time/renewal issuance of the identity card, or a replacement of a previously issued card.
fields.sourceRef: Obrazac LK/OI-1 page 1, item 1, checkbox pair

fields.name: applicantPersonalId
fields.label: JMB (Applicant's unique master citizen number)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: applicantFirstName
fields.label: Ime(na) (Applicant's first name(s))
fields.description: If the first name consists of more than one word, the form asks the applicant to indicate which one(s) will be used (footnote **).

fields.name: applicantLastName
fields.label: Prezime (Applicant's last name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: applicantSex
fields.label: Spol/Pol (Applicant's sex)
fields.description: Printed as a single labelled answer line, not a checkbox pair (unlike several other fields on this form); typically recorded as M (muški/male) or Ž (ženski/female).

fields.name: parentFirstName
fields.label: Ime jednog roditelja (First name of one parent)
fields.description: Used as an additional identifying particular of the applicant.

fields.name: parentLastName
fields.label: Prezime istog roditelja (Last name of the same parent)
fields.description: The surname of the same parent named in parentFirstName.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Datum rođenja (Date of birth)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Mjesto rođenja (Place of birth)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: permanentResidenceMunicipality
fields.label: Općina prebivališta (Municipality of permanent residence)
fields.description: The municipality of the applicant's permanent residence (prebivalište).

fields.name: temporaryResidenceMunicipalityForDisplaced
fields.label: Općina boravišta za raseljena lica i povratnike (Municipality of temporary residence, for displaced persons and returnees)
fields.description: Only applicable to applicants who are displaced persons or returnees with a temporary residence distinct from their permanent one.

fields.name: postalCode
fields.label: Poštanski broj (Postal code)
fields.description: Postal code of the applicant's address.

fields.name: address
fields.label: Adresa (Address)
fields.description: Street address of the applicant's residence.

fields.name: entityCitizenship
fields.label: Entitetsko državljanstvo (Entity citizenship)
fields.description: The form's own footnote (*) states this datum is entered only at the applicant's own request, since it is not otherwise mandatory for the identity card.

fields.name: bloodType
fields.label: Krvna grupa (Blood type)
fields.description: The form's own footnote (*) states this datum is entered only at the applicant's own request, since it is not otherwise mandatory for the identity card.

fields.name: previousCardIssuePlace
fields.label: Mjesto izdavanja (Place of issue of the previously issued card)
fields.description: Data on the identity card being replaced.

fields.name: previousCardRegistryNumber
fields.label: Reg. broj (Registry number of the previously issued card)
fields.description: Data on the identity card being replaced.

fields.name: previousCardIssueDate
fields.label: Datum izdavanja (Date of issue of the previously issued card)
fields.description: Data on the identity card being replaced. YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: previousCardAttached
fields.label: Ličnu kartu-osobnu iskaznicu prilažem uz ovaj zahtjev (I am enclosing the identity card with this request)
fields.description: Whether the applicant is physically enclosing the previously issued card with this request.
fields.sourceRef: Obrazac LK/OI-1 page 1, item 3, DA/NE checkbox pair

fields.name: replacementReason
fields.label: Zamjena ranije izdane lične karte-osobne iskaznice (Reason for replacing the previously issued identity card)
fields.description: The single reason selected from the form's own checkbox grid (item 4). Two of the sixteen printed options — 'personalNameChange' (Promjena ličnog imena) and 'nameChange' (Promjena imena) — read as near-duplicates in translation; both are preserved verbatim as distinct source checkboxes rather than merged, since the source itself prints them as two separate boxes (see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: Obrazac LK/OI-1 page 1, item 4, checkbox grid

fields.name: collectionMethod
fields.label: Preuzimanje LK-OI (Collection method for the identity card)
fields.description: How the applicant will collect the issued/replaced identity card.
fields.sourceRef: Obrazac LK/OI-1 page 1, item 5, checkbox triple

fields.name: attachmentsDescription
fields.label: Prilog (Enclosures)
fields.description: Free-text listing of any documents the applicant is enclosing with this request.

steps.title: Data on the previously issued identity card (replacement only)
